{"text":"The heatmap visualization reveals that the **Northeast region** has the highest profit in the **Electronics category** with  **$1,053,305**, while the **Northwest region** has the lowest profit in the **Music category** with  **$9,155**. The **Northeast region** also leads in total profit across all categories, amounting to  **$1,300,732**. Conversely, the **Northwest region** has the lowest total profit at  **$266,986**. The **Electronics category** consistently generates the highest profits across all regions, while the **Music category** tends to generate the lowest profits. The overall total profit across all regions and categories is  **$5,293,624**.","interpretationStash":{"approach":"sql","userQuestion":"show me heatmap of Region ('Region' is an attribute) Category ('Category' is an attribute) and Profit ('Profit' is a metric) ","sql":"SELECT `Region@DESC`, `Category@DESC`, `Profit` AS `Profit` FROM `Interpretation` GROUP BY `Region@DESC`, {"text":"What is the average revenue per order by region?","type":"text","content":{"text":"What is the average revenue per order by region?"}}

{"text":"The average revenue per order varies slightly by region. The **Northwest** region has the highest average revenue per order at  **$53**. Most other regions, including Central, Mid-Atlantic, South, Southwest, Northeast, and Southeast, have an average revenue per order of  **$52**. The **Web** region has the lowest average revenue per order at  **$51**. This indicates a relatively small range in average revenue per order across different regions, with only a $2 difference between the highest and lowest values.","interpretationStash":{"approach":"sql","userQuestion":"What is the average revenue per order by region?","sql":"SELECT `Region@DESC`, AVG(`Avg Revenue per Order`) AS `Avg Revenue per Order` FROM `Interpretation` GROUP BY
